title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six specific phrases to use with Claude Code that allegedly improve development speed by 10x. He claims these techniques come from the Claude Code creator and researcher Andrej Karpathy, and cautions against one dangerous prompting pattern that wastes time and money.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six specific phrases to use with Claude Code, framing them as ways to speed up AI-assisted development. The techniques are attributed to the Claude Code creator and to researcher Andrej Karpathy, and the video also flags one prompting pattern to avoid because it wastes time and money. The focus is practical: concrete wording for prompts rather than general theory.
